data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for separate policies for different roles.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for separate policies for different roles (drivers, warehouse, office). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for separate policies, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this functionality has been implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of separate policies being implemented or validated for different roles.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for separate policies for different roles.
